description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat, dark gray roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a wide balcony on the upper floor, supported by white columns, and a covered porch area below. Large rectangular windows are arranged in neat rows on both levels, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the front, and a side area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. A white car is parked on the driveway, and the house is surrounded by several green trees, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor leisure spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front balcony, and a side pool area, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, two palm trees, driveway, and pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and symmetrical window arrangement; pool area is not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balcony, pool, lounge area, and more surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and rear landscaping; palm trees and driveway are less visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, white columns, and a balcony above; wide steps lead to the front door.
